Name: Main Controller
Description: Real-time microcontroller for precise stepper motor control and endstop sensor monitoring.

Name: Motor Driver
Description: Dual H-bridge motor driver to control two DC motors.

Name: Left Front DC Motor
Description: Geared DC motor used to rotate the solar panel along a single axis.

Name: Left Rear DC Motor
Description: Geared DC motor used to rotate the solar panel along a single axis.

Name: Right Front DC Motor
Description: Geared DC motor used to rotate the solar panel along a single axis.

Name: Right Rear DC Motor
Description: Geared DC motor used to rotate the solar panel along a single axis.

Name: Battery 1
Description: Rechargeable lithium-ion battery for main power supply.

Name: Battery 2
Description: Rechargeable lithium-ion battery for main power supply.

Name: Chassis Base Plate
Description: Main base plate for the robot chassis, providing a mounting surface for all components.

Name: Left Front Wheel
Description: Rubber wheel for left front BO DC motor, providing traction and movement.

Name: Right Front Wheel
Description: Rubber wheel for right front BO DC motor, providing traction and movement.

Name: Left Rear Wheel
Description: Rubber wheel for left rear BO DC motor, providing traction and movement.

Name: Right Rear Wheel
Description: Rubber wheel for right rear BO DC motor, providing traction and movement.

Name: Chassis Mounting Screws
Description: Standard M3 screws for general component mounting to the chassis plate.

Name: M3 Nuts
Description: Hex nuts for securing M3 screws.

Name: M3 Brass Standoffs
Description: Hex standoffs for mounting PCBs and providing clearance from the chassis.

Name: ESP32 Dev Module Mount
Description: 3D printed mount to secure the ESP32 Dev Module to the chassis.

Name: L298N Motor Driver Mount
Description: 3D printed mount to secure the L298N Motor Driver to the chassis.

Name: OLED Display Mount
Description: 3D printed mount/bezel for the 0.91/0.96 inch I2C OLED Display, securing it to the chassis.

Name: 18650 Series Battery Holder
Description: 3D printed holder for two 18650 Li-ion batteries, designed for series connection and chassis mounting.

Name: Left Front BO Motor Mount
Description: 3D printed mount for the left front BO DC motor, securing it to the chassis.

Name: Right Front BO Motor Mount
Description: 3D printed mount for the right front BO DC motor, securing it to the chassis.

Name: Left Rear BO Motor Mount
Description: 3D printed mount for the left rear BO DC motor, securing it to the chassis.

Name: Right Rear BO Motor Mount
Description: 3D printed mount for the right rear BO DC motor, securing it to the chassis.
